---
title: "📚 Learning"
subtitle: "Selected repositories and workshops from my studies"
---

## 📦 Repositories

**Numerical Linear Algebra** (FGV EMAp, 2023.1, Undergraduate)  
  _Solving linear systems with numerical stability and efficiency._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Numerical-Linear-Algebra)

**Machine Learning**  (FGV EMAp, 2024.1, Undergraduate)  
  _Probabilistic machine learning, mixture models, and approximate Bayesian inference._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Machine-Learning)

**Deep Learning**  (FGV EMAp, 2024.2, Undergraduate)  
  _Foundations of NN, CNNs, LSTMs, GANs, Transformers, transfer learning, and autoencoders._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Deep-Learning)

**Pesquisa de Survey (Survey Research)** (IESP-UERJ, 2025.1, Graduate)  
  _Total survey error paradigm, sampling, questionnaire design, post-stratification._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Survey-Research) · 🌐 [Website](https://felipelamarca.com/Survey-Research/)

**Lego I** (IESP-UERJ, 2025.1, Graduate)  
  _Quantitative social science: data analysis, research design, probability, inference._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Lego-I) · 🌐 [Website](https://felipelamarca.com/Lego-I/)

**Lego II** (IESP-UERJ, 2025.2, Graduate)  
  _A deep dive into regression models._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Lego-II) · 🌐 [Website](https://felipelamarca.com/Lego-II/)

**Introdução aos Estudos Legislativos (Introduction to Legislative Studies)** (IESP-UERJ, 2025.2, Graduate)  
  _An introduction to legislative behavior according to rational choice theory._  
  🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/felipelmc/Intro-Legislative-Studies/) · 🌐 [Website](https://felipelamarca.com/Intro-Legislative-Studies/)

---

## 🛠 Workshops & Training

**[July 2024]** [SICSS: Summer Institute in Computational Social Science](https://sicss.io/2024/fgv-ecmi-brazil/)  
  _Collaborated with international researchers on CSS projects during a two-week program at FGV._

**[July 2024]** [ML4Good Bootcamp](https://www.ml4good.org/)  
  _Ten-day intensive on AI Safety, alignment, and responsible development._
